summary: QUIC disabled, all traffic confirmed h2. Etap still did NOT block. Root cause: actual prompt goes via gemini.google.com/_/BardChatUi/data/batchexecute (rpcids=aPya6c), NOT via signaler-pa.clients6.google.com. The DB-registered domain/path is only a notification channel, not the AI prompt endpoint. Correct DB registration should be: domain=gemini.google.com, path=/_/BardChatUi/data/batchexecute

batchexecute.note: THIS is the actual AI prompt endpoint. Must register this in DB.

signaler_pa_channel.note: This is only a notification/polling channel, NOT the prompt endpoint. Currently registered in DB but wrong target.

current_registration.issue: This is a notification channel, not the AI prompt endpoint

correct_registration.note: batchexecute with rpcids=aPya6c carries the actual user prompt to Gemini AI

db_correction_needed.additional_note: QUIC bypass was a secondary issue. Even with QUIC disabled (h2 fallback), blocking fails because the wrong endpoint is registered in DB.
